message:
fix: StartTestDoltServer ignores production port when BEADS_TEST_MODE=1

Clown Show #16: When BEADS_DOLT_PORT=3307 leaks into the test
environment (via gastown metadata.json injection), StartTestDoltServer
reuses the production server instead of starting an isolated instance.
This is the root cause of persistent test pollution on production.

The fix: when BEADS_TEST_MODE=1 and BEADS_DOLT_PORT is the production
port (3307), always start a fresh isolated server instead of reusing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
